name: AvoidNeoadjuvantTherapyForSmallHer2Positive
title: Do not routinely offer neoadjuvant chemotherapy or anti-HER2 therapy for T1a or T1b N0 HER2-positive disease
description: Avoid routine neoadjuvant chemotherapy or anti-HER2 agents outside a clinical trial for small node-negative HER2-positive disease.

coding.display: Hormone receptor positive with human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 negative status
